name: Arde Madrid
overview: Madrid, 1961. Ana Mari is single, lame, Francoist and instructor of the Sección Femenina. By order of the dictator Franco, she must go to work as a maid to Ava Gardner's house and spy on her, pretending to be married to Manolo, a hustler who will become the driver of the American actress.

trailers.title: Arde Madrid: Burn Madrid Burn (Official U.S. Trailer)
